appsync.datasource.awsiamconfig.CfnAbout:
Use the `AwsIamConfig` property type to specify `AwsIamConfig` for a AWS AppSync authorizaton.

 `AwsIamConfig` is a property of the [AWS AppSync DataSource AuthorizationConfig](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-appsync-datasource-httpconfig-authorizationconfig.html) resource.

appsync.datasource.awsiamconfig.SigningR.Description: The signing Region for AWS Identity and Access Management authorization.

appsync.datasource.awsiamconfig.SigningS.Description: The signing service name for AWS Identity and Access Management authorization.
